# Zicy

> Zicy is an AI visibility platform that measures how AI describes a brand, diagnoses what is inaccurate, acts on the fixes a brand controls, and proves the work moved demand, across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Google AI Mode.

- Brand: Zicy
- Legal name: Growth Pro Sdn. Bhd.
- Parent company: Growth.pro
- Category: AI visibility platform
- Location: Penang, Malaysia

## Canonical pages

- Home: https://www.zicy.com/
- About: https://www.zicy.com/about
- Platform: https://www.zicy.com/platform
- Pricing: https://www.zicy.com/pricing
- For brands: https://www.zicy.com/solutions/brands
- For PR agencies: https://www.zicy.com/solutions/pr
- For marketing and creative agencies: https://www.zicy.com/solutions/agencies
- For publishers: https://www.zicy.com/solutions/publishers
- For small businesses: https://www.zicy.com/solutions/smb
- Case studies: https://www.zicy.com/case-studies
- Consultant: https://www.zicy.com/consultant
- Contact: https://www.zicy.com/contact

- Help centre: https://docs.zicy.com/

- How to add effective prompts to your AI tracking: https://www.zicy.com/resources/effective-prompts-ai-tracking
- Cloudflare bot management for AI brand discoverability: https://www.zicy.com/resources/cloudflare-bot-management
- What is answer engine optimisation (AEO), pillar guide: https://www.zicy.com/resources/what-is-answer-engine-optimization
- How to benchmark your AEO readiness against competitors: https://www.zicy.com/resources/benchmark-aeo-readiness
